description_long: This shotgun features a robust metallic barrel with a ribbed pump-action fore-end and a matte black full stock. The receiver area is highlighted in orange, contrasting with the silver-gray barrel and black grip. A boxy, black under-barrel attachment is present, possibly a magazine or tactical accessory. The top of the receiver includes a red-brown sight or scope, adding to its tactical appearance. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and mechanical details, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a ribbed metallic barrel, orange receiver, black full stock, and tactical attachments including a scope and under-barrel accessory.
description_view_0: Side view showing the orange receiver, ribbed pump, black full stock, and under-barrel attachment.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, compact width, and alignment of the scope and under-barrel accessory.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with clearer visibility of the scope and pump details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the black stock, orange receiver, and the alignment of the barrel and attachments.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with ribbed pump fore-end and medium length barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
